# Plan: Lecturer Guide — Interactive Cheat Sheet

> Source: PRD: .specs/lecturer-guide/prd.md
> Design: .specs/lecturer-guide/design.md
> For architecture, interfaces, and data models — see Design document above.

## Phase 1: Foundation — Scaffold + Layout + Sidebar + Collapsible Sections + Module 1

**Covers**: App startup, sidebar navigation, collapsible sections, content type visual markers, module content structure, data architecture — all proven with Module 1 as the tracer bullet.

### What to build

A complete vertical slice: Vite + React + Tailwind project in `lecturer-guide/`, app layout with fixed sidebar and scrollable content area, sidebar listing all modules (clickable, with active highlighting), recursive `CollapsibleSection` component with animated expand/collapse, `ContentBlock` components for all 5 content types (talking points, examples, transitions, time markers, Q&A) with distinct visual styling, and the full Module 1 data file + Introduction data file migrated from `Ръководство_за_лектора.md`.

End state: `npm run dev` opens a working app. Sidebar shows all modules. Clicking "Модул 1" renders all 4 sections (1.1–1.4) as collapsible sections with proper visual markers. Clicking "Въведение" shows the intro section.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] WHEN the lecturer runs `npm run dev` in `lecturer-guide/`, THE system SHALL start a local dev server and display the app URL _(PRD: #1.1)_
- [ ] WHEN the lecturer opens the URL, THE system SHALL render sidebar + content area with the Introduction section visible _(PRD: #1.2, #1.3)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL display a left sidebar listing all navigable sections in course order: Introduction, Module 1–6, Day 1 Summary, Day 2 Review _(PRD: #2.1)_
- [ ] WHEN the lecturer clicks a module in the sidebar, THE system SHALL switch the content area to that module and highlight it in the sidebar _(PRD: #2.2, #2.3, #2.4)_
- [ ] WHEN the lecturer clicks a section header, THE system SHALL toggle it with a smooth 200-300ms animation _(PRD: #3.1)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL support collapsible sections nested to at least 4 levels deep _(PRD: #3.2)_
- [ ] WHEN a section is collapsed, THE system SHALL show only the title + right-pointing chevron; when expanded, down-pointing chevron + content _(PRD: #3.3, #3.4)_
- [ ] WHEN a parent section is collapsed, THE system SHALL hide all children; when re-expanded, restore children to their previous states _(PRD: #3.5, #3.6)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL render talking points, examples, transitions, time markers, and Q&A markers each with distinct visual styling (color-coded left border + icon) _(PRD: #4.1–#4.5)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL render bold terms with definitions visually emphasized _(PRD: #4.6)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL display Module 1 with title, duration, time marker, and all 4 sections (1.1–1.4) with complete content from the source Markdown _(PRD: #6.1–#6.5)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL store content in a JS data file separate from UI components, following the `CourseModule` / `Section` / `TalkingPoint` interfaces from design.md _(PRD: #7.1–#7.3)_

---

## Phase 2: Linear Navigation + Module 2

**Covers**: Next/previous topic navigation, proven with cross-module navigation between Module 1 and Module 2.

### What to build

Add `NavigationControls` component with next/previous buttons in a fixed position. Define the `navigationOrder` array and `sectionToModule` mapping from design.md. Migrate Module 2 data (sections 2.1–2.4) from the source Markdown. Clicking "next" from section 1.4 should cross into Module 2, switch the sidebar highlight, expand section 2.1, and scroll it into view.

End state: full linear navigation works across two modules. Next/prev buttons are visible, functional, and update sidebar state.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] THE system SHALL display next/previous topic buttons in a fixed position at the bottom of the content area _(PRD: #5.1, #5.2)_
- [ ] WHEN the lecturer clicks "next topic", THE system SHALL navigate to the next section in linear order, expand it, and scroll it into view _(PRD: #5.3)_
- [ ] WHEN the lecturer clicks "previous topic", THE system SHALL navigate to the previous section, expand it, and scroll it into view _(PRD: #5.4)_
- [ ] WHEN at the first section (intro), THE system SHALL disable/hide the previous button _(PRD: #5.6)_
- [ ] WHEN navigating via next/prev, THE system SHALL update sidebar highlighting to reflect the new active module _(PRD: #5.8)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL include Module 2 data (sections 2.1–2.4) with complete content from the source Markdown _(PRD: #8.1)_
- [ ] WHEN navigating from section 1.4 to 2.1, THE system SHALL switch the active module from Module 1 to Module 2 _(PRD: #5.3, #5.8)_

---

## Phase 3: Full Content Migration

**Covers**: Complete content migration of all remaining modules and interstitial sections.

### What to build

Migrate all remaining content from `Ръководство_за_лектора.md`: Modules 3–6, Day 1 Summary, Day 2 Review. Complete the `navigationOrder` array to cover the full course sequence including the day split (Module 5 section 5.1 → Day 1 Summary → Day 2 Review → Module 5 sections 5.2–5.4). Verify the last-section disable on the next button.

End state: the app contains the entire course guide. Linear navigation walks through every section from Introduction to Module 6.4. Ready for use.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] THE system SHALL include all content from the source Markdown: Introduction, Modules 1–6, Day 1 Summary, Day 2 Review _(PRD: #8.1)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL preserve all talking points, examples, transition notes, and time markers without omission _(PRD: #8.2)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL preserve the bilingual convention — Bulgarian text with English terms in parentheses _(PRD: #8.3)_
- [ ] THE system SHALL preserve all real-world examples with details (company names, years, figures) _(PRD: #8.4)_
- [ ] THE linear navigation order SHALL follow: Introduction → 1.1–1.4 → 2.1–2.4 → 3.1–3.4 → 4.1–4.5 → 5.1 → Day 1 Summary → Day 2 Review → 5.2–5.4 → 6.1–6.4 _(PRD: #5.5)_
- [ ] WHEN at section 6.4 (last section), THE system SHALL disable/hide the next button _(PRD: #5.7)_

---

## Progress

- [x] Phase 1: Foundation — Scaffold + Layout + Sidebar + Collapsible Sections + Module 1
- [x] Phase 2: Linear Navigation + Module 2
- [x] Phase 3: Full Content Migration

## Notes

All three phases completed. The app contains the full course guide with 27 navigable sections across 6 modules + intro + day summaries.
